title: The Impact of Central and Peripheral Cyclooxygenase Enzyme Inhibition on Exercise-Induced Elevations in Core Body Temperature.

formulations.notes: Endpoint summary values suggest a significant decrease in core body temperature due to combined COX inhibition.
